---
title: "Psychological Research with R"
image: "./img/psychresearchR.png"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

```{r echo = F}
knitr::include_graphics("./img/psychresearchR.png")
```


## [Online Book](https://the-tave.github.io/psych_research_with_r)

This is an [online book](https://the-tave.github.io/psych_research_with_r) targeted at psychology students starting to learn R. 
From installation to a finished, automated statistical report in R Markdown, it covers all the basics needed to really profit from R knowledge!

It is based on a university course and also includes some exercises.
As of March 2026, it is still a work in progress.
